arguments.task: Open official Supabase documentation and first-party pages to determine: a one-line product description; all documented API/auth methods for developers; whether access is self-serve free, trial, paid, admin approval, or partner/contact-sales gated; API surface type and breadth; whether Supabase has an official MCP server or documentation; buildability today; any rate limit notes. Read the actual page content and navigate only to canonical first-party pages such as docs, auth guides, platform/pricing pages, and GitHub pages owned by Supabase if needed. Return the exact URLs you used and concise evidence for each finding. Do not rely on search result snippets.

raw_result.description: Open-source backend platform that provides Postgres, auth, instant APIs, realtime, storage, and edge functions.
raw_result.auth_notes: First-party docs describe user authentication providers including OAuth, and project API access using publishable/secret API keys plus JWT-based access tokens in the Authorization header for REST requests.
raw_result.gating_reason: Supabase offers a self-serve Free tier alongside Pro, Team, and Enterprise plans on its public pricing page.

api_surface.breadth: Supabase documents REST APIs for database and management access, GraphQL support, realtime capabilities, auth, storage, and edge-function related platform features.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Supabase has an official MCP server documented at its AI Tools MCP guide, including the hosted endpoint https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp and setup instructions for Claude Code.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Public pricing states Free includes unlimited API requests, 5 GB egress, 50k MAU, and only 2 active projects; platform docs also document product-specific rate and performance limits.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs are extensive, include SDKs and management APIs, and Supabase publishes an official MCP integration guide and hosted MCP endpoint.
raw_result.human_review_reason: The gathered evidence strongly supports most fields, but the exact API auth-method mapping between documented API keys and JWT bearer tokens across all relevant APIs was not directly quoted from the page text in this pass, so auth_methods should be human-checked if strict schema mapping is required.
